mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_seatunnel_streaming_job_table_metrics_current ( job_instance_id, job_definition_id, engine_job_id, client_id, pipeline_id, source_table, sink_table, table_key, table_key_hash, read_row_count, write_row_count, read_qps, write_qps, read_bytes, write_bytes, read_bps, write_bps, status, error_msg, last_collect_time_ms, last_collect_time ) VALUES
( #{item.jobInstanceId}, #{item.jobDefinitionId}, #{item.engineJobId}, #{item.clientId}, #{item.pipelineId}, #{item.sourceTable}, #{item.sinkTable}, #{item.tableKey}, #{item.tableKeyHash}, #{item.readRowCount}, #{item.writeRowCount}, #{item.readQps}, #{item.writeQps}, #{item.readBytes}, #{item.writeBytes}, #{item.readBps}, #{item.writeBps}, #{item.status}, #{item.errorMsg}, #{item.lastCollectTimeMs}, #{item.lastCollectTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE job_definition_id = VALUES(job_definition_id), engine_job_id = VALUES(engine_job_id), client_id = VALUES(client_id), source_table = VALUES(source_table), sink_table = VALUES(sink_table), table_key = VALUES(table_key), read_row_count = VALUES(read_row_count), write_row_count = VALUES(write_row_count), read_qps = VALUES(read_qps), write_qps = VALUES(write_qps), read_bytes = VALUES(read_bytes), write_bytes = VALUES(write_bytes), read_bps = VALUES(read_bps), write_bps = VALUES(write_bps), status = VALUES(status), error_msg = VALUES(error_msg), last_collect_time_ms = VALUES(last_collect_time_ms), last_collect_time = VALUES(last_collect_time), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
